issues.detail: The skill lacks error handling and edge case coverage in code examples.

scenarios.name: presigned PUT URL for avatar + bucket CORS
scenarios.rationale: Baseline often reaches for aws-sdk v2 conventions and sets CORS via the console, while treatment uses the v3 PutObjectCommand + getSignedUrl(expiresIn) and PutBucketCorsCommand with ExposeHeaders: ETag exactly as documented.

scenarios.name: MinIO local + Cloudflare R2 prod via one S3 client
scenarios.rationale: Baseline either splits SDKs or forgets forcePathStyle for MinIO and guesses the R2 endpoint; treatment uses one @aws-sdk/client-s3 S3Client with forcePathStyle:true for MinIO and region:'auto' plus the correct r2.cloudflarestorage.com endpoint.
